# NAC Framework — Complete AI Reference

> Modular .NET 10 foundation framework for scalable backend Web APIs.
> CQRS, multi-tenancy, clean architecture. No MediatR dependency.
> Version: 1.0 | License: MIT | .NET 10 | C# 13

---

## 1. Package Map & Dependencies

15 NuGet packages. Strict one-direction dependency graph:

```
L0: Nac.Core                    — Zero-dep contracts (only DI.Abstractions)
     ↑
L1:  ├── Nac.Domain             — Domain primitives, persistence interfaces
     ├── Nac.CQRS               — Custom mediator, pipeline behaviors
     └── Nac.Caching            — Query caching behaviors
          ↑
L2+: ├── Nac.Persistence        — EF Core integration, UoW, outbox
     │    └── Nac.Persistence.PostgreSQL
     ├── Nac.Identity           — ASP.NET Identity + JWT + tenant roles
     ├── Nac.Messaging          — Event bus (InMemory, Outbox)
     │    └── Nac.Messaging.RabbitMQ
     ├── Nac.MultiTenancy       — Tenant resolution middleware
     ├── Nac.Observability      — Structured logging behaviors
     ├── Nac.WebApi             — Response envelopes, exception handler, module framework
     └── Nac.Testing            — Fakes for unit testing
```

### Install by scenario

**Minimal (CQRS + PostgreSQL):**
```bash
dotnet add package Nac.Core
dotnet add package Nac.Domain
dotnet add package Nac.CQRS
dotnet add package Nac.Persistence.PostgreSQL
dotnet add package Nac.WebApi
```

**Full stack:**
```bash
dotnet add package Nac.Identity
dotnet add package Nac.Messaging.RabbitMQ  # or Nac.Messaging for InMemory/Outbox
dotnet add package Nac.MultiTenancy
dotnet add package Nac.Caching
dotnet add package Nac.Observability
dotnet add package Nac.Testing             # test projects only
```

---

## 2. Quick Start

### Program.cs (minimal)

```csharp
var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);
var connectionString = builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection")!;

// Register mediator with handler assemblies
builder.Services.AddNacMediator(opts => opts
    .RegisterHandlersFromAssemblyContaining<CatalogModule>()
    .AddCommandBehavior(typeof(UnitOfWorkBehavior<,>)));

// Register modules
builder.Services.AddCatalogInfrastructure(connectionString);

var app = builder.Build();
app.UseNacWebApi(); // Global exception handler
CatalogEndpoints.Map(app);
app.Run();
```

### Program.cs (module framework)

```csharp
var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

builder.AddNacFramework(nac =>
{
    nac.AddModule<CatalogModule>();
    nac.AddModule<OrdersModule>();
});

var app = builder.Build();
app.UseNacFramework(); // Pipeline + endpoints for all modules
app.Run();
```

### nac.json (project manifest)

```json
{
  "framework": { "name": "nac", "version": "1.0.0" },
  "solution": { "name": "MyApp", "namespace": "MyApp" },
  "database": { "provider": "postgresql", "connectionStringKey": "DefaultConnection" },
  "modules": {
    "Catalog": { "version": "1.0.0", "dependencies": [] },
    "Orders": { "version": "1.0.0", "dependencies": ["Catalog"] }
  }
}
```

---

## 3. Nac.Core — L0 Contracts

Zero ASP.NET Core dependency. Only refs `Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Abstractions`.

### Base Entity Types

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Core

public abstract class Entity<TId> : IHasDomainEvents, IEquatable<Entity<TId>>
    where TId : notnull
{
    public TId Id { get; protected init; }
    public IReadOnlyList<INotification> DomainEvents { get; }
    public void ClearDomainEvents();
    protected void RaiseDomainEvent(INotification domainEvent);
    // Equality by Id (transient entities use reference equality)
}

public abstract class AggregateRoot<TId> : Entity<TId>
    where TId : notnull
{
    public uint Version { get; protected set; }  // Optimistic concurrency
}

public abstract class ValueObject : IEquatable<ValueObject>
{
    protected abstract IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents();
    // Structural equality via GetEqualityComponents()
}

public abstract record StronglyTypedId<TValue>(TValue Value)
    where TValue : notnull;
// Usage: public sealed record ProductId(Guid Value) : StronglyTypedId<Guid>(Value);

public abstract class Enumeration : IComparable<Enumeration>, IEquatable<Enumeration>
{
    public int Id { get; }
    public string Name { get; }
    protected Enumeration(int id, string name);
    public static IReadOnlyList<TEnum> GetAll<TEnum>() where TEnum : Enumeration;
    public static TEnum? FromId<TEnum>(int id) where TEnum : Enumeration;
    public static TEnum? FromName<TEnum>(string name) where TEnum : Enumeration;
}

public interface IHasDomainEvents
{
    IReadOnlyList<INotification> DomainEvents { get; }
    void ClearDomainEvents();
}

public sealed record DomainError(string Code, string Message)
{
    public static DomainError NotFound(string entity, object id);
    public static DomainError Validation(string code, string message);
    public static DomainError Conflict(string code, string message);
}

public interface IDateTimeProvider
{
    DateTimeOffset UtcNow { get; }
}

public sealed class SystemDateTimeProvider : IDateTimeProvider
{
    public DateTimeOffset UtcNow => DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;
}
```

### Auth Contracts (namespace Nac.Core.Auth)

```csharp
public interface ICurrentUser
{
    string? UserId { get; }
    string? UserName { get; }
    bool IsAuthenticated { get; }
    IReadOnlySet<string> Permissions { get; }
    bool HasPermission(string permission);  // Supports wildcards: "catalog.*", "*.create"
}

public interface IRequirePermission
{
    string Permission { get; }  // e.g. "catalog.products.create"
}

public interface IIdentityService
{
    Task<UserInfo?> GetUserInfoAsync(Guid userId, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<IReadOnlyList<UserInfo>> GetUsersAsync(IEnumerable<Guid> userIds, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<bool> IsInRoleAsync(Guid userId, string role, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

public sealed record UserInfo(
    Guid Id, string Email, string? DisplayName, string? TenantId, IReadOnlyList<string> Roles);
```

### Messaging Contracts (namespace Nac.Core.Messaging)

```csharp
public interface INotification;  // Marker for in-process pub/sub (domain events)

public interface IIntegrationEvent
{
    Guid EventId { get; }
    DateTimeOffset OccurredAt { get; }
    string EventType { get; }
}

public abstract record IntegrationEvent : IIntegrationEvent
{
    public Guid EventId { get; init; }           // = Guid.NewGuid()
    public DateTimeOffset OccurredAt { get; init; }  // = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow
    public string EventType { get; }             // = GetType().FullName!
}

public interface IIntegrationEventHandler<in TEvent> where TEvent : IIntegrationEvent
{
    Task HandleAsync(TEvent @event, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

public interface IEventBus
{
    Task PublishAsync(IIntegrationEvent @event, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

// Built-in identity events
public sealed record UserRegisteredEvent(Guid UserId, string Email, string? TenantId) : IntegrationEvent;
public sealed record UserEmailConfirmedEvent(Guid UserId, string? TenantId) : IntegrationEvent;
public sealed record PasswordResetEvent(Guid UserId, string? TenantId) : IntegrationEvent;
```

### Multi-Tenancy Contracts (namespace Nac.Core.MultiTenancy)

```csharp
public interface ITenantContext
{
    bool IsMultiTenant { get; }
    TenantInfo? Current { get; }
    string? TenantId => Current?.Id;  // Default interface method
}

public sealed record TenantInfo(
    string Id, string Name,
    string? ConnectionString = null,
    string? Schema = null,
    IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>? Properties = null);
```

### Caching Markers (namespace Nac.Core.Caching)

```csharp
public interface ICacheable
{
    string CacheKey { get; }
    TimeSpan? Expiry => null;  // Default: 5 minutes (set in behavior)
}

public interface ICacheInvalidator
{
    IEnumerable<string> CacheKeysToInvalidate { get; }
}
```

### Modularity Markers (namespace Nac.Core.Modularity)

```csharp
public interface IAuditable;      // Marker: log audit trail
public interface ITransactional;  // Marker: wrap in explicit DB transaction
```

### Exceptions (namespace Nac.Core.Exceptions)

```csharp
public abstract class NacException(string message, Exception? innerException = null)
    : Exception(message, innerException)
{
    public abstract int StatusCode { get; }
}

public sealed class NacValidationException : NacException     // 400
{
    public IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string[]> Errors { get; }
    public NacValidationException(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string[]> errors);
    public NacValidationException(string field, string error);
}

public sealed class NacUnauthorizedException(string message = "Authentication is required.")
    : NacException(message)  // 401

public sealed class NacForbiddenException(string message = "You do not have permission to perform this action.")
    : NacException(message)  // 403

public sealed class NacNotFoundException : NacException  // 404
{
    public NacNotFoundException(string message);
    public NacNotFoundException(string entityName, object id);  // "entityName 'id' was not found."
}

public sealed class NacConflictException(string message) : NacException(message)  // 409
public sealed class NacDomainException(string message) : NacException(message)    // 422
```

### WebApi Helpers (namespace Nac.Core.WebApi)

```csharp
public sealed record PaginationRequest(int Page = 1, int PageSize = 20)
{
    // Page clamped: < 1 → 1. PageSize clamped: < 1 or > 100 → 20
    public int Skip { get; }  // (Page - 1) * PageSize
    public int Take { get; }  // PageSize
}
```

---

## 4. Nac.Domain — Domain Primitives & Persistence Contracts

Refs: Nac.Core only.

### Domain Events

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Domain

public abstract record DomainEvent : INotification
{
    public Guid EventId { get; init; }              // = Guid.NewGuid()
    public DateTimeOffset OccurredAt { get; init; } // = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow
}
```

### Audit & Soft-Delete

```csharp
public interface IAuditableEntity
{
    DateTimeOffset CreatedAt { get; set; }
    string? CreatedBy { get; set; }
    DateTimeOffset? LastModifiedAt { get; set; }
    string? LastModifiedBy { get; set; }
}

public interface ISoftDeletable
{
    bool IsDeleted { get; set; }
    DateTimeOffset? DeletedAt { get; set; }
    string? DeletedBy { get; set; }
}
```

NacDbContext auto-fills `IAuditableEntity` fields on SaveChanges. `ISoftDeletable` converts Delete to Update (sets IsDeleted=true) + applies global query filter `WHERE IsDeleted = false`.

### Persistence Interfaces (namespace Nac.Domain.Persistence)

```csharp
public interface IReadRepository<TEntity> where TEntity : class
{
    Task<TEntity?> GetByIdAsync<TId>(TId id, CancellationToken ct = default) where TId : notnull;
    Task<TEntity?> FirstOrDefaultAsync(ISpecification<TEntity> spec, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<IReadOnlyList<TEntity>> ListAllAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<IReadOnlyList<TEntity>> ListAsync(ISpecification<TEntity> spec, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<int> CountAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<int> CountAsync(ISpecification<TEntity> spec, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<bool> AnyAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<bool> AnyAsync(ISpecification<TEntity> spec, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

public interface IRepository<TEntity> : IReadRepository<TEntity> where TEntity : class
{
    void Add(TEntity entity);
    void AddRange(IEnumerable<TEntity> entities);
    void Update(TEntity entity);
    void Remove(TEntity entity);
    void RemoveRange(IEnumerable<TEntity> entities);
}

public interface IUnitOfWork : IDisposable, IAsyncDisposable
{
    Task<int> SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task BeginTransactionAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task CommitTransactionAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task RollbackTransactionAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
}
```

### Specification Pattern

```csharp
public interface ISpecification<TEntity> where TEntity : class
{
    IReadOnlyList<Expression<Func<TEntity, bool>>> Criteria { get; }
    IReadOnlyList<Expression<Func<TEntity, object>>> Includes { get; }
    IReadOnlyList<string> IncludeStrings { get; }
    IReadOnlyList<OrderExpression<TEntity>> OrderExpressions { get; }
    int? Skip { get; }
    int? Take { get; }
    bool IsPagingEnabled { get; }
}

public sealed record OrderExpression<TEntity>(
    Expression<Func<TEntity, object>> KeySelector,
    OrderDirection Direction) where TEntity : class;

public enum OrderDirection { Ascending, Descending }

// Abstract base class with fluent protected API:
public abstract class Specification<TEntity> : ISpecification<TEntity> where TEntity : class
{
    protected void Where(Expression<Func<TEntity, bool>> criteria);
    protected void Include(Expression<Func<TEntity, object>> include);
    protected void Include(string navigationPropertyPath);
    protected void OrderBy(Expression<Func<TEntity, object>> keySelector);
    protected void OrderByDescending(Expression<Func<TEntity, object>> keySelector);
    protected void ApplyPaging(int skip, int take);
}
```

**Example: Custom Specification**

```csharp
public sealed class ActiveProductsByCategory : Specification<Product>
{
    public ActiveProductsByCategory(string category, int page, int pageSize)
    {
        Where(p => p.Category == category);
        Where(p => !p.IsDiscontinued);
        Include(p => p.Images);
        OrderByDescending(p => p.CreatedAt);
        ApplyPaging((page - 1) * pageSize, pageSize);
    }
}

// Usage in handler:
var products = await _repository.ListAsync(new ActiveProductsByCategory("Electronics", 1, 20), ct);
```

---

## 5. Nac.CQRS — Custom Mediator

Refs: Nac.Core only. Zero MediatR dependency.

### Abstractions (namespace Nac.CQRS.Abstractions)

```csharp
// Commands
public interface ICommand;                     // Void command (no return)
public interface ICommand<out TResult>;        // Returning command

// Queries
public interface IQuery<out TResult>;          // Read-only

// Handlers
public interface ICommandHandler<in TCommand> where TCommand : ICommand
{
    Task HandleAsync(TCommand command, CancellationToken ct);
}

public interface ICommandHandler<in TCommand, TResult> where TCommand : ICommand<TResult>
{
    Task<TResult> HandleAsync(TCommand command, CancellationToken ct);
}

public interface IQueryHandler<in TQuery, TResult> where TQuery : IQuery<TResult>
{
    Task<TResult> HandleAsync(TQuery query, CancellationToken ct);
}

public interface INotificationHandler<in TNotification> where TNotification : INotification
{
    Task HandleAsync(TNotification notification, CancellationToken ct);
}

// Pipeline behaviors (middleware)
public interface ICommandBehavior<in TCommand, TResponse>
{
    Task<TResponse> HandleAsync(TCommand command, RequestHandlerDelegate<TResponse> next, CancellationToken ct);
}

public interface IQueryBehavior<in TQuery, TResponse>
{
    Task<TResponse> HandleAsync(TQuery query, RequestHandlerDelegate<TResponse> next, CancellationToken ct);
}

// Pre/Post processors
public interface IPreProcessor<in TRequest>
{
    Task ProcessAsync(TRequest request, CancellationToken ct);
}

public interface IPostProcessor<in TRequest, in TResponse>
{
    Task ProcessAsync(TRequest request, TResponse response, CancellationToken ct);
}
```

### Core Types (namespace Nac.CQRS.Core)

```csharp
public delegate Task<TResponse> RequestHandlerDelegate<TResponse>(CancellationToken ct);

public readonly record struct Unit
{
    public static readonly Unit Value;
    public static readonly Task<Unit> Task;
}

public interface IMediator
{
    Task SendAsync(ICommand command, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<TResult> SendAsync<TResult>(ICommand<TResult> command, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task<TResult> SendAsync<TResult>(IQuery<TResult> query, CancellationToken ct = default);
    Task PublishAsync(INotification notification, CancellationToken ct = default);
}
```

### Registration (namespace Nac.CQRS.Registration)

```csharp
public sealed class MediatorOptions
{
    public MediatorOptions RegisterHandlersFromAssembly(Assembly assembly);
    public MediatorOptions RegisterHandlersFromAssemblyContaining<TMarker>();
    public MediatorOptions AddCommandBehavior(Type openGenericBehaviorType);
    public MediatorOptions AddQueryBehavior(Type openGenericBehaviorType);
}

public static class MediatorServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddNacMediator(
        this IServiceCollection services, Action<MediatorOptions> configure);

    public static IServiceCollection AddNacMediator<TMarker>(
        this IServiceCollection services);
}
```

### CQRS Pipeline Order

**Command pipeline:**
```
Observability → Validation → Authorization → [CacheInvalidation] → UnitOfWork → Handler → SaveChanges → DomainEvents
```

**Query pipeline:**
```
Observability → Validation → Authorization → CacheCheck → Handler → CacheStore
```

Behaviors execute in registration order. Register observability first (outermost), UoW last (innermost before handler).

### Example: Command + Handler

```csharp
// Command
public sealed record CreateProductCommand(string Name, decimal Price, string? Description)
    : ICommand<Guid>,
      ITransactional,
      IRequirePermission
{
    public string Permission => "catalog.products.create";
}

// Handler
public sealed class CreateProductCommandHandler : ICommandHandler<CreateProductCommand, Guid>
{
    private readonly IRepository<Product> _repository;

    public CreateProductCommandHandler(IRepository<Product> repository)
        => _repository = repository;

    public async Task<Guid> HandleAsync(CreateProductCommand command, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        var product = Product.Create(command.Name, command.Price, command.Description);
        _repository.Add(product);
        // NEVER call SaveChanges — UnitOfWorkBehavior handles it
        return product.Id;
    }
}
```

### Example: Query with Caching

```csharp
public sealed record GetProductByIdQuery(Guid Id) : IQuery<ProductDto?>, ICacheable
{
    public string CacheKey => $"product:{Id}";
    public TimeSpan? Expiry => TimeSpan.FromMinutes(10);
}

public sealed class GetProductByIdQueryHandler : IQueryHandler<GetProductByIdQuery, ProductDto?>
{
    private readonly IReadRepository<Product> _repository;

    public GetProductByIdQueryHandler(IReadRepository<Product> repository)
        => _repository = repository;

    public async Task<ProductDto?> HandleAsync(GetProductByIdQuery query, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        var product = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(query.Id, ct);
        return product is null ? null : new ProductDto(product.Id, product.Name, product.Price);
    }
}
```

---

## 6. Module Architecture — 2-Project Pattern

Each module splits into **core** (clean) and **infrastructure** (EF Core):

```
src/
  Modules/
    MyApp.Modules.Catalog/                     # Module core (CLEAN)
      Domain/Entities/Product.cs
      Application/Commands/CreateProduct/
        CreateProductCommand.cs
        CreateProductCommandHandler.cs
      Application/Queries/GetProducts/
        GetProductsQuery.cs
        GetProductsQueryHandler.cs
      Contracts/IProductRepository.cs          # Custom repo interface (optional)
      Endpoints/ProductEndpoints.cs
      CatalogModule.cs                         # INacModule implementation
    MyApp.Modules.Catalog.Infrastructure/      # Module infrastructure
      CatalogDbContext.cs
      Configurations/ProductConfiguration.cs
      Repositories/ProductRepository.cs        # Custom repo implementation
      CatalogInfrastructureExtensions.cs       # DI registration
```

### Module Core — allowed refs: Nac.Core, Nac.Domain, Nac.CQRS ONLY

```csharp
// CatalogModule.cs
public sealed class CatalogModule : INacModule
{
    public string Name => "Catalog";

    public void ConfigureServices(IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration config)
    {
        // Handlers registered via AddNacMediator in Host
    }

    public void ConfigureEndpoints(IEndpointRouteBuilder routes)
    {
        var group = routes.MapGroup("/api/catalog").WithTags("Catalog");
        ProductEndpoints.Map(group);
    }
}
```

### Module Infrastructure — refs: Nac.Persistence, Module core

```csharp
// CatalogDbContext.cs
public sealed class CatalogDbContext : NacDbContext
{
    public CatalogDbContext(DbContextOptions<CatalogDbContext> options, ICurrentUser? currentUser = null)
        : base(options, currentUser) { }

    protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
    {
        base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);
        modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(CatalogDbContext).Assembly);
    }
}

// CatalogInfrastructureExtensions.cs
public static class CatalogInfrastructureExtensions
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddCatalogInfrastructure(
        this IServiceCollection services, string connectionString)
    {
        services.AddNacPostgreSQL<CatalogDbContext>(connectionString);
        services.AddNacRepositoriesFromAssembly<CatalogDbContext>(
            typeof(CatalogModule).Assembly);
        return services;
    }
}
```

### Host Wiring (1 line per module)

```csharp
// Program.cs
var connectionString = builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection")!;
services.AddCatalogInfrastructure(connectionString);
```

### INacModule Interface

```csharp
// namespace Nac.WebApi.Modularity
public interface INacModule
{
    string Name { get; }
    IReadOnlyList<Type> Dependencies => [];                                  // Optional
    void ConfigureServices(IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration configuration);
    void ConfigureEndpoints(IEndpointRouteBuilder routes);
    void ConfigurePipeline(IApplicationBuilder app) { }                      // Optional, default no-op
}
```

### NacFrameworkBuilder

```csharp
public sealed class NacFrameworkBuilder
{
    public IServiceCollection Services { get; }
    public IConfiguration Configuration { get; }
    public NacFrameworkBuilder AddModule<TModule>() where TModule : INacModule, new();
    public NacFrameworkBuilder AddModule(INacModule module);
    // Validates dependencies, detects circular deps at startup
}
```

### Repository Auto-Registration

`AddNacRepositoriesFromAssembly<TContext>(assembly)` scans the assembly for all types inheriting `Entity<TId>` and registers:
- `IRepository<TEntity>` → `EfRepository<TEntity>` (scoped, bound to TContext)
- `IReadRepository<TEntity>` → `EfRepository<TEntity>` (scoped, bound to TContext)

For custom repositories, define interface in module core `Contracts/`, implement in `.Infrastructure`, register manually:
```csharp
services.AddScoped<IProductRepository, ProductRepository>();
```

---

## 7. Nac.Persistence — EF Core Integration

### NacDbContext

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Persistence
public abstract class NacDbContext : DbContext
{
    protected NacDbContext(DbContextOptions options, ICurrentUser? currentUser = null);

    public DbSet<OutboxMessage> OutboxMessages { get; }
    public DbSet<InboxMessage> InboxMessages { get; }

    // Auto behaviors:
    // - IAuditableEntity: auto-fills CreatedAt/By, LastModifiedAt/By from ICurrentUser
    // - ISoftDeletable: converts Delete → Update with IsDeleted=true
    // - SoftDeleteQueryFilterConvention: auto-applies WHERE IsDeleted = false
    // - Sync SaveChanges() throws NotSupportedException (async only)

    public IReadOnlyList<INotification> CollectAndClearDomainEvents();
}
```

### EfRepository

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Persistence.Repository
public class EfRepository<TEntity> : IRepository<TEntity> where TEntity : class
{
    protected readonly DbContext Context;
    protected readonly DbSet<TEntity> DbSet;
    public EfRepository(DbContext context);
    // Implements all IRepository<T> methods
    // Uses SpecificationEvaluator internally to translate ISpecification → LINQ
}
```

### UnitOfWork

```csharp
public interface INacUnitOfWork : IUnitOfWork
{
    IReadOnlyList<INotification> CollectAndClearDomainEvents();
}

public sealed class EfUnitOfWork<TContext> : INacUnitOfWork where TContext : NacDbContext
{
    // SaveChanges, Begin/Commit/Rollback Transaction, CollectAndClearDomainEvents, Dispose
}
```

### UnitOfWorkBehavior (Command Pipeline)

```csharp
public sealed class UnitOfWorkBehavior<TCommand, TResponse> : ICommandBehavior<TCommand, TResponse>
{
    // Lifecycle:
    // 1. Call next() → handler executes
    // 2. SaveChangesAsync() on all registered INacUnitOfWork instances
    // 3. CollectAndClearDomainEvents() → PublishAsync via IMediator
    // 4. If new events generated → SaveChanges + dispatch again (max 10 rounds)
}
```

### Outbox Pattern

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Persistence.Outbox
public sealed class OutboxMessage
{
    public Guid Id { get; init; }
    public required string EventType { get; init; }    // CLR type FQN
    public required string Payload { get; init; }      // JSON
    public DateTimeOffset OccurredAt { get; init; }
    public DateTimeOffset? ProcessedAt { get; set; }   // null = unprocessed
    public string? Error { get; set; }
    public int RetryCount { get; set; }
}

public sealed class InboxMessage  // Deduplication on consumer side
{
    public Guid EventId { get; init; }
    public required string EventType { get; init; }
    public DateTimeOffset ProcessedAt { get; init; }
}
```

### DI Extensions

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Persistence.Extensions
public static class PersistenceServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    // Register TContext + EfUnitOfWork + INacUnitOfWork + UnitOfWorkBehavior
    public static IServiceCollection AddNacPersistence<TContext>(
        this IServiceCollection services,
        Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder>? configureOptions = null)
        where TContext : NacDbContext;

    // Manual single-entity repository registration
    public static IServiceCollection AddNacRepository<TEntity, TContext>(
        this IServiceCollection services) where TEntity : class where TContext : NacDbContext;

    // Auto-scan: registers IRepository<T> + IReadRepository<T> for all Entity<TId> subtypes
    public static IServiceCollection AddNacRepositoriesFromAssembly<TContext>(
        this IServiceCollection services, Assembly assembly) where TContext : NacDbContext;
}

// namespace Nac.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Extensions
public static class PostgreSqlPersistenceExtensions
{
    // Wrapper: AddNacPersistence + UseNpgsql in one call
    public static IServiceCollection AddNacPostgreSQL<TContext>(
        this IServiceCollection services,
        string connectionString,
        Action<NpgsqlDbContextOptionsBuilder>? configureNpgsql = null)
        where TContext : NacDbContext;
}
```

### EF Migrations

```bash
# Add migration
dotnet ef migrations add AddProducts \
  -p src/MyApp.Modules.Catalog.Infrastructure \
  -s src/MyApp.Host

# Apply migration
dotnet ef database update \
  -p src/MyApp.Modules.Catalog.Infrastructure \
  -s src/MyApp.Host
```

Each module owns its own DbContext and migrations.

---

## 8. Nac.Identity — ASP.NET Identity + JWT + Permissions

### Entities

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.Entities

// Unsealed — can be extended by consumer projects
public class NacIdentityUser : IdentityUser<Guid>
{
    public string? DisplayName { get; set; }
    public string? TenantId { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset CreatedAt { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
    public string? CreatedBy { get; set; }
    public bool IsDeleted { get; set; }
    public ICollection<TenantMembership> TenantMemberships { get; set; }
    public ICollection<RefreshToken> RefreshTokens { get; set; }
}

public sealed class NacRole : IdentityRole<Guid>
{
    public NacRole();
    public NacRole(string roleName);
}

public sealed class TenantMembership
{
    public Guid Id { get; set; }
    public Guid UserId { get; set; }
    public required string TenantId { get; set; }
    public Guid TenantRoleId { get; set; }
    public TenantRole? TenantRole { get; set; }
    public bool IsOwner { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset JoinedAt { get; set; }
}

public sealed class TenantRole
{
    public Guid Id { get; set; }
    public required string TenantId { get; set; }
    public required string Name { get; set; }
    public List<string> Permissions { get; set; }  // e.g. ["catalog.products.create", "orders.*"]
    public DateTimeOffset CreatedAt { get; set; }
}

public sealed class RefreshToken
{
    public Guid Id { get; set; }
    public Guid UserId { get; set; }
    public required string TokenHash { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset ExpiresAt { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset CreatedAt { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset? RevokedAt { get; set; }
    public string? DeviceInfo { get; set; }
    public string? TenantId { get; set; }
    public bool IsActive { get; }  // computed: RevokedAt == null && ExpiresAt > UtcNow
}
```

### Identity DbContext

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.Data

// Generic — for custom TUser extending NacIdentityUser
public class NacIdentityDbContext<TUser> : IdentityDbContext<TUser, NacRole, Guid>
    where TUser : NacIdentityUser
{
    public DbSet<TenantRole> TenantRoles { get; }
    public DbSet<TenantMembership> TenantMemberships { get; }
    public DbSet<RefreshToken> RefreshTokens { get; }
}

// Non-generic convenience alias
public class NacIdentityDbContext : NacIdentityDbContext<NacIdentityUser>;
```

### Services

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.Services

public interface IJwtTokenService<TUser> where TUser : NacIdentityUser
{
    Task<TokenResult> GenerateTokensAsync(TUser user, string? tenantId = null, string? deviceInfo = null);
    Task<TokenResult?> RefreshTokensAsync(string refreshToken, string? deviceInfo = null);
    Task RevokeAllTokensAsync(Guid userId);
    Task RevokeTokenAsync(string refreshToken);
}

public interface IJwtTokenService : IJwtTokenService<NacIdentityUser>;  // Non-generic alias

public sealed record TokenResult(
    string AccessToken, string RefreshToken,
    DateTimeOffset AccessTokenExpiresAt, DateTimeOffset RefreshTokenExpiresAt);

public interface IRefreshTokenStore
{
    Task StoreAsync(RefreshToken token);
    Task<RefreshToken?> GetByHashAsync(string tokenHash);
    Task RevokeAsync(string tokenHash);
    Task RevokeAllForUserAsync(Guid userId);
    Task<int> CleanupExpiredAsync();
}

public interface ITenantRoleService
{
    Task InitializeTenantAsync(string tenantId, Guid ownerUserId);
    Task<IReadOnlyList<TenantRole>> GetRolesAsync(string tenantId);
    Task<TenantRole?> GetRoleByNameAsync(string tenantId, string roleName);
    Task<TenantRole> CreateRoleAsync(string tenantId, string name, IEnumerable<string> permissions);
    Task UpdateRolePermissionsAsync(Guid roleId, IEnumerable<string> permissions);
    Task<bool> DeleteRoleAsync(Guid roleId);
    Task<TenantMembership> AssignUserToTenantAsync(Guid userId, string tenantId, Guid roleId, bool isOwner = false);
    Task ChangeUserRoleAsync(Guid userId, string tenantId, Guid newRoleId);
    Task RemoveUserFromTenantAsync(Guid userId, string tenantId);
    Task<TenantMembership?> GetMembershipAsync(Guid userId, string tenantId);
}
```

### JwtCurrentUser

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.CurrentUser
public sealed class JwtCurrentUser : ICurrentUser
{
    // Reads UserId, UserName from JWT claims
    // IsAuthenticated from HttpContext.User.Identity
    // Permissions: lazy-loaded from DB via TenantMembership → TenantRole.Permissions
    // HasPermission: supports wildcard matching ("catalog.*" matches "catalog.products.create")
}
```

### Authorization Behaviors

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity
// Checks IRequirePermission.Permission against ICurrentUser.HasPermission
// Throws NacForbiddenException if unauthorized
public sealed class AuthorizationCommandBehavior<TCommand, TResponse> : ICommandBehavior<TCommand, TResponse>;
public sealed class AuthorizationQueryBehavior<TQuery, TResponse> : IQueryBehavior<TQuery, TResponse>;
```

### Options

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.Options
public sealed class NacIdentityOptions
{
    public const string SectionName = "NacIdentity";
    public string? SigningKey { get; set; }
    public string Issuer { get; set; }              // default: "nac-identity"
    public string Audience { get; set; }            // default: "nac-api"
    public TimeSpan AccessTokenExpiry { get; set; } // default: 15 minutes
    public TimeSpan RefreshTokenExpiry { get; set; }// default: 7 days
    public bool UseRedisRefreshTokenStore { get; set; }
    public string? RedisConnection { get; set; }
    public List<DefaultRoleDefinition> DefaultRoles { get; set; }
}

public sealed class DefaultRoleDefinition
{
    public required string Name { get; init; }
    public List<string> Permissions { get; init; }  // default: []
}
```

### Seeding

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.Seeding
public static class DefaultRoles
{
    public const string Owner = "Owner";
    public const string Admin = "Admin";
    public const string Member = "Member";
    public static IReadOnlyList<DefaultRoleDefinition> GetDefaults();
}

public sealed class IdentitySeeder
{
    public Task SeedDefaultRolesForTenantAsync(string tenantId);
}
```

### Event Publishing

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.Services
public class IdentityEventPublisher<TUser> where TUser : NacIdentityUser
{
    public Task PublishUserRegisteredAsync(TUser user, string? tenantId = null, CancellationToken ct = default);
    public Task PublishEmailConfirmedAsync(TUser user, string? tenantId = null, CancellationToken ct = default);
    public Task PublishPasswordResetAsync(TUser user, string? tenantId = null, CancellationToken ct = default);
}
```

### DI & Middleware

```csharp
// namespace Nac.Identity.Extensions

// Full setup: DbContext + Identity + JWT auth + JwtCurrentUser + all services + behaviors
public static IdentityBuilder AddNacIdentity<TUser>(
    this IServiceCollection services,
    IConfiguration configuration,
    Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder> configureDbContext,
    Action<NacIdentityOptions>? configure = null) where TUser : NacIdentityUser;

// Non-generic alias (uses NacIdentityUser)
public static IdentityBuilder AddNacIdentity(
    this IServiceCollection services,
    IConfiguration configuration,
    Action<DbContextOptionsBuilder> configureDbContext,
    Action<NacIdentityOptions>? configure = null);

// Standalone: only register authorization behaviors (no Identity setup)
public static IServiceCollection AddNacAuthorization(this IServiceCollection services);

// Middleware: preloads permissions from DB before request hits handlers
public static IApplicationBuilder UseNacIdentity(this IApplicationBuilder app);
```

### Identity Linking Pattern (CRITICAL)

Business entities link to NacIdentityUser via **Guid primitive only** — no navigation property:

```csharp
// ✅ CORRECT
public sealed class Staff : AggregateRoot<Guid>
{
    public Guid UserId { get; set; }  // FK to NacIdentityUser.Id
    public required string EmployeeCode { get; init; }
}

// ❌ WRONG — couples module core to Nac.Identity (infrastructure package)
public sealed class Staff : AggregateRoot<Guid>
{
    public NacIdentityUser User { get; set; }  // FORBIDDEN
}
```

Access user info through `ICurrentUser` (from Nac.Core) or `IIdentityService`:

```csharp
public sealed class GetCurrentStaffQueryHandler : IQueryHandler<GetCurrentStaffQuery, StaffDto?>
{
    private readonly ICurrentUser _currentUser;
    private readonly IReadRepository<Staff> _staffRepo;

    public async Task<StaffDto?> HandleAsync(GetCurrentStaffQuery query, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        if (!_currentUser.IsAuthenticated) return null;
        var userId = Guid.Parse(_currentUser.UserId!);
        var spec = new StaffByUserIdSpec(userId);
        var staff = await _staffRepo.FirstOrDefaultAsync(spec, ct);
        return staff is null ? null : staff.ToDto();
    }
}
```

FK constraints enforced at database level only (in migrations or raw SQL in EF configuration).

---

## 9. Nac.MultiTenancy — Tenant Resolution

3 strategies, 4 built-in resolvers.

### Strategies

| Strategy | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| Discriminator | TenantId column + EF global filter (shared DB) |
| Schema | Schema per tenant, switched at runtime |
| Database | Separate database per tenant (ConnectionString from TenantInfo) |

### Resolvers

```csharp
// namespace Nac.MultiTenancy.Resolvers
public sealed class HeaderTenantResolver : ITenantResolver
{
    public HeaderTenantResolver(string headerName = "X-Tenant-ID");
}

public sealed class ClaimTenantResolver : ITenantResolver
{
    public ClaimTenantResolver(string claimType = "tenant_id");
}

public sealed class SubdomainTenantResolver : ITenantResolver;
// acme.myapp.com → "acme"

public sealed class QueryStringTenantResolver : ITenantResolver
{
    public QueryStringTenantResolver(string parameterName = "tenant");
}
```

### Tenant Store

```csharp
public interface ITenantResolver
{
    Task<string?> ResolveAsync(HttpContext context, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

public interface ITenantStore
{
    Task<TenantInfo?> GetByIdAsync(string tenantId, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

public sealed class InMemoryTenantStore : ITenantStore  // Dev/test only
{
    public InMemoryTenantStore(IEnumerable<TenantInfo> tenants);
}
```

### Setup

```csharp
// DI
services.AddNacMultiTenancy(mt =>
{
    mt.AddHeaderResolver("X-Tenant-ID");
    mt.AddClaimResolver("tenant_id");
    mt.UseInMemoryStore(new[]
    {
        new TenantInfo("acme", "Acme Corp"),
        new TenantInfo("globex", "Globex Inc")
    });
    // Or: mt.UseStore<DbTenantStore>();
});

// Middleware (must be before auth middleware)
app.UseNacMultiTenancy();
```

### MultiTenancyBuilder

```csharp
// namespace Nac.MultiTenancy.Extensions
public sealed class MultiTenancyBuilder
{
    public MultiTenancyBuilder AddHeaderResolver(string headerName = "X-Tenant-ID");
    public MultiTenancyBuilder AddClaimResolver(string claimType = "tenant_id");
    public MultiTenancyBuilder AddSubdomainResolver();
    public MultiTenancyBuilder AddQueryStringResolver(string parameterName = "tenant");
    public MultiTenancyBuilder AddResolver<TResolver>() where TResolver : class, ITenantResolver;
    public MultiTenancyBuilder UseInMemoryStore(IEnumerable<TenantInfo> tenants);
    public MultiTenancyBuilder UseStore<TStore>() where TStore : class, ITenantStore;
}
```

Middleware chains resolvers (first match wins). Returns 400 if required tenant not found in store.

---

## 10. Messaging & Events

### Dual Event System

| Type | Scope | Delivery | Transaction |
|------|-------|----------|-------------|
| **Domain Event** | In-process | Sync via IMediator.PublishAsync | Same transaction (dispatched by UoW) |
| **Integration Event** | Cross-module/service | Async via IEventBus | Eventual consistency |

### Domain Event Flow

```csharp
// 1. Define event (in module core)
public sealed record OrderPlacedEvent(Guid OrderId, decimal Total) : DomainEvent;

// 2. Raise in entity
public sealed class Order : AggregateRoot<Guid>
{
    public static Order Create(/* ... */)
    {
        var order = new Order { /* ... */ };
        order.RaiseDomainEvent(new OrderPlacedEvent(order.Id, order.Total));
        return order;
    }
}

// 3. Handle (in same module or another — handler registered via AddNacMediator)
public sealed class OrderPlacedEventHandler : INotificationHandler<OrderPlacedEvent>
{
    public async Task HandleAsync(OrderPlacedEvent notification, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        // React to order placed: update inventory, send email, etc.
    }
}
```

Domain events are dispatched by `UnitOfWorkBehavior` AFTER `SaveChanges` — within the same transaction scope. Cascading events loop up to 10 rounds.

### Integration Event Flow

```csharp
// 1. Define event (in shared contracts)
public sealed record OrderCreatedIntegrationEvent(Guid OrderId, decimal Total) : IntegrationEvent;

// 2. Publish via IEventBus (typically from domain event handler)
public sealed class PublishOrderCreatedHandler : INotificationHandler<OrderPlacedEvent>
{
    private readonly IEventBus _eventBus;
    public async Task HandleAsync(OrderPlacedEvent evt, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        await _eventBus.PublishAsync(new OrderCreatedIntegrationEvent(evt.OrderId, evt.Total), ct);
    }
}

// 3. Handle in another module/service
public sealed class OrderCreatedHandler : IIntegrationEventHandler<OrderCreatedIntegrationEvent>
{
    public async Task HandleAsync(OrderCreatedIntegrationEvent @event, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        // Process in billing module, send notifications, etc.
    }
}
```

### Messaging Providers

**InMemory (dev/test):**
```csharp
services.AddNacInMemoryMessaging(typeof(MyHandler).Assembly);
```
Uses `Channel<IIntegrationEvent>` — singleton, single reader, no persistence.

**Outbox (production — transactional guarantee):**
```csharp
services.AddNacOutboxMessaging<CatalogDbContext>(typeof(MyHandler).Assembly);
```
Writes to `OutboxMessages` table in same transaction. `OutboxWorker` polls every 5s, batch 50, 10 retries.

**RabbitMQ (distributed):**
```csharp
services.AddNacRabbitMQ(opts =>
{
    opts.HostName = "rabbitmq";
    opts.ExchangeName = "nac.events";
    opts.QueueName = "myapp.catalog";
    opts.PrefetchCount = 10;
}, typeof(MyHandler).Assembly);
```

### RabbitMQ Options

```csharp
public sealed class RabbitMqOptions
{
    public string HostName { get; set; }        // default: "localhost"
    public int Port { get; set; }               // default: 5672
    public string UserName { get; set; }        // default: "guest"
    public string Password { get; set; }        // default: "guest"
    public string VirtualHost { get; set; }     // default: "/"
    public string ExchangeName { get; set; }    // default: "nac.events"
    public string QueueName { get; set; }       // default: "" (auto-generated)
    public ushort PrefetchCount { get; set; }   // default: 10
    public bool Durable { get; set; }           // default: true
}
```

---

## 11. Nac.Caching — Query Cache Behaviors

### How It Works

- **Queries** implementing `ICacheable` → cached via `IDistributedCache` (JSON serialized)
- **Commands** implementing `ICacheInvalidator` → invalidate specified cache keys AFTER handler executes

### Behaviors

```csharp
// Query: check cache before handler, store result after handler
public sealed class CachingQueryBehavior<TQuery, TResponse> : IQueryBehavior<TQuery, TResponse>;

// Command: run handler first, then invalidate cache keys
public sealed class CacheInvalidationBehavior<TCommand, TResponse> : ICommandBehavior<TCommand, TResponse>;
```

### Setup

```csharp
services.AddNacCaching();
// Registers AddDistributedMemoryCache() as fallback + both behaviors
// For Redis: add services.AddStackExchangeRedisCache(...) BEFORE AddNacCaching()
```

### Example: Cache + Invalidation

```csharp
// Cached query
public sealed record GetProductsQuery(string Category) : IQuery<IReadOnlyList<ProductDto>>, ICacheable
{
    public string CacheKey => $"products:category:{Category}";
    public TimeSpan? Expiry => TimeSpan.FromMinutes(5);
}

// Command that invalidates the cache
public sealed record CreateProductCommand(string Name, decimal Price, string Category)
    : ICommand<Guid>, ICacheInvalidator
{
    public IEnumerable<string> CacheKeysToInvalidate =>
        [$"products:category:{Category}"];
}
```

---

## 12. Nac.WebApi — API Layer

### Response Envelope Types

```csharp
// namespace Nac.WebApi

public sealed record ResponseMeta
{
    public DateTimeOffset Timestamp { get; init; }  // = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow
    public string? TraceId { get; init; }           // = Activity.Current?.Id
}

public sealed record ApiResponse<T>
{
    public required T Data { get; init; }
    public ResponseMeta Meta { get; init; }
    public static ApiResponse<T> Success(T data);
}

public sealed record PaginatedResponse<T>
{
    public required IReadOnlyList<T> Data { get; init; }
    public required PaginationMeta Pagination { get; init; }
    public ResponseMeta Meta { get; init; }
    public static PaginatedResponse<T> Create(IReadOnlyList<T> items, int page, int pageSize, int total);
}

public sealed record PaginationMeta(int Page, int PageSize, int Total)
{
    public int TotalPages { get; }  // computed
}

public sealed record ErrorResponse
{
    public required ApiError Error { get; init; }
    public ResponseMeta Meta { get; init; }
}

public sealed record ApiError(string Code, string Message, IReadOnlyList<ApiErrorDetail>? Details = null);
public sealed record ApiErrorDetail(string Field, string Message);
```

### Global Exception Handler

Maps `NacException` subtypes to HTTP responses:

| Exception | HTTP | Error Code |
|-----------|------|------------|
| NacValidationException | 400 | validation_error |
| NacUnauthorizedException | 401 | unauthorized |
| NacForbiddenException | 403 | forbidden |
| NacNotFoundException | 404 | not_found |
| NacConflictException | 409 | conflict |
| NacDomainException | 422 | domain_error |
| Unhandled | 500 | internal_error (no stack trace leaked) |

Setup:
```csharp
app.UseNacWebApi();  // Adds GlobalExceptionHandler middleware
```

### Module Framework DI

```csharp
// namespace Nac.WebApi.Extensions

// Register all modules — validates dependencies, detects circular deps
public static WebApplicationBuilder AddNacFramework(
    this WebApplicationBuilder builder, Action<NacFrameworkBuilder> configure);

// Call ConfigurePipeline + ConfigureEndpoints for all registered modules
public static WebApplication UseNacFramework(this WebApplication app);

// Standalone: just add exception handler
public static IApplicationBuilder UseNacWebApi(this IApplicationBuilder app);
```

### Example: Endpoint with Paginated Response

```csharp
public static class ProductEndpoints
{
    public static void Map(RouteGroupBuilder group)
    {
        group.MapGet("/", GetProducts);
        group.MapGet("/{id:guid}", GetProductById);
        group.MapPost("/", CreateProduct);
    }

    private static async Task<IResult> GetProducts(
        [AsParameters] PaginationRequest pagination,
        [FromQuery] string? category,
        IMediator mediator, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        var query = new GetProductsQuery(category, pagination);
        var (items, total) = await mediator.SendAsync<(IReadOnlyList<ProductDto>, int)>(query, ct);
        return Results.Ok(PaginatedResponse<ProductDto>.Create(
            items, pagination.Page, pagination.PageSize, total));
    }

    private static async Task<IResult> CreateProduct(
        CreateProductRequest request, IMediator mediator, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        var command = new CreateProductCommand(request.Name, request.Price, request.Description);
        var productId = await mediator.SendAsync<Guid>(command, ct);
        return Results.Created($"/api/catalog/products/{productId}",
            ApiResponse<Guid>.Success(productId));
    }
}
```

---

## 13. Nac.Testing — Test Fakes

### FakeCurrentUser

```csharp
public sealed class FakeCurrentUser : ICurrentUser
{
    // Factory methods
    public static FakeCurrentUser Authenticated(string userId = "test-user", params string[] permissions);
    public static FakeCurrentUser Anonymous();

    // Mutable
    public void Grant(string permission);
    public void Revoke(string permission);

    // ICurrentUser implementation with wildcard matching
}
```

### FakeEventBus

```csharp
public sealed class FakeEventBus : IEventBus
{
    public IReadOnlyList<IIntegrationEvent> PublishedEvents { get; }
    public IReadOnlyList<T> PublishedOf<T>() where T : IIntegrationEvent;
    public void Clear();
}
```

### FakeTenantContext

```csharp
public sealed class FakeTenantContext : ITenantContext
{
    public TenantInfo? Current { get; set; }
    public bool IsMultiTenant { get; }  // => Current is not null
}
```

### Example: Unit Testing a Command Handler

```csharp
[Fact]
public async Task CreateProduct_ShouldAddToRepository()
{
    // Arrange
    var repo = new InMemoryRepository<Product>();
    var fakeUser = FakeCurrentUser.Authenticated("user-1", "catalog.products.create");
    var handler = new CreateProductCommandHandler(repo);
    var command = new CreateProductCommand("Widget", 29.99m, "A widget");

    // Act
    var productId = await handler.HandleAsync(command, CancellationToken.None);

    // Assert
    var product = await repo.GetByIdAsync(productId);
    Assert.NotNull(product);
    Assert.Equal("Widget", product.Name);
}

[Fact]
public async Task Should_PublishIntegrationEvent_WhenOrderCreated()
{
    // Arrange
    var fakeEventBus = new FakeEventBus();
    var handler = new OrderPlacedEventHandler(fakeEventBus);
    var domainEvent = new OrderPlacedEvent(Guid.NewGuid(), 100m);

    // Act
    await handler.HandleAsync(domainEvent, CancellationToken.None);

    // Assert
    var published = fakeEventBus.PublishedOf<OrderCreatedIntegrationEvent>();
    Assert.Single(published);
    Assert.Equal(100m, published[0].Total);
}
```

---

## 14. Forbidden Patterns (CRITICAL)

These rules are non-negotiable. Violating them breaks the clean architecture boundaries.

| Rule | Why |
|------|-----|
| **Module core → Nac.Persistence** ✗ | Only `.Infrastructure` can reference persistence. Module core is persistence-ignorant. |
| **Module core → Nac.Identity** ✗ | Use `ICurrentUser` from Nac.Core instead. Identity is infrastructure. |
| **Module core → own .Infrastructure** ✗ | Dependency flows one way: Infrastructure → Core, never reverse. |
| **Navigation property to NacIdentityUser** ✗ | Use `Guid UserId` primitive. FK enforced at DB level only. |
| **Cross-module DbContext access** ✗ | Modules are isolated. Use Integration Events for cross-module communication. |
| **Direct project references between modules** ✗ | Use Integration Events or shared contracts. |
| **IQueryable exposure from repositories** ✗ | Return `IReadOnlyList<T>` or concrete types. Use Specification pattern for complex queries. |
| **Handlers calling SaveChanges** ✗ | `UnitOfWorkBehavior` handles persistence. Handlers only mutate entities. |
| **Sync SaveChanges on NacDbContext** ✗ | Throws `NotSupportedException`. Always use async. |

### Dependency Rules Summary

```
Module core → Nac.Core, Nac.Domain, Nac.CQRS ONLY
Module.Infrastructure → Nac.Persistence + Module core
Host → Module.Infrastructure + Module core + Nac.Identity
```

---

## 15. Permission Format

```
module.resource.action

Examples:
  catalog.products.create
  catalog.products.update
  catalog.products.delete
  catalog.products.read
  orders.orders.approve

Wildcards:
  catalog.*           → all catalog permissions
  *.create            → create permission in any module
  orders.orders.*     → all order permissions
```

`ICurrentUser.HasPermission` matches wildcards. Both the user's permissions AND the checked permission support wildcards.

---

## 16. Configuration Reference

### appsettings.json — Identity Section

```json
{
  "NacIdentity": {
    "SigningKey": "your-256-bit-secret-key-here-min-32-chars",
    "Issuer": "myapp",
    "Audience": "myapp-api",
    "AccessTokenExpiry": "00:15:00",
    "RefreshTokenExpiry": "7.00:00:00",
    "UseRedisRefreshTokenStore": false,
    "RedisConnection": "redis:6379",
    "DefaultRoles": [
      { "Name": "Owner", "Permissions": ["*"] },
      { "Name": "Admin", "Permissions": ["catalog.*", "orders.*"] },
      { "Name": "Member", "Permissions": ["catalog.products.read", "orders.orders.read"] }
    ]
  },
  "ConnectionStrings": {
    "DefaultConnection": "Host=localhost;Database=myapp;Username=postgres;Password=password",
    "IdentityConnection": "Host=localhost;Database=myapp_identity;Username=postgres;Password=password"
  }
}
```

### Behavior Registration Order

Register behaviors in this order (outermost first):

```csharp
builder.Services.AddNacMediator(opts =>
{
    opts.RegisterHandlersFromAssemblyContaining<CatalogModule>();

    // Command behaviors (outermost → innermost)
    opts.AddCommandBehavior(typeof(LoggingCommandBehavior<,>));       // Nac.Observability
    opts.AddCommandBehavior(typeof(AuthorizationCommandBehavior<,>)); // Nac.Identity
    opts.AddCommandBehavior(typeof(CacheInvalidationBehavior<,>));    // Nac.Caching
    opts.AddCommandBehavior(typeof(UnitOfWorkBehavior<,>));           // Nac.Persistence (MUST be last)

    // Query behaviors (outermost → innermost)
    opts.AddQueryBehavior(typeof(LoggingQueryBehavior<,>));           // Nac.Observability
    opts.AddQueryBehavior(typeof(AuthorizationQueryBehavior<,>));     // Nac.Identity
    opts.AddQueryBehavior(typeof(CachingQueryBehavior<,>));           // Nac.Caching
});
```

### Middleware Order

```csharp
var app = builder.Build();

app.UseNacWebApi();           // Global exception handler (FIRST)
app.UseNacMultiTenancy();     // Tenant resolution (BEFORE auth)
app.UseAuthentication();       // ASP.NET Core auth
app.UseAuthorization();        // ASP.NET Core authz
app.UseNacIdentity();         // Preload permissions from DB

app.UseNacFramework();        // Module pipelines + endpoints
// OR manually: CatalogEndpoints.Map(app);

app.Run();
```

### Complete Program.cs Example

```csharp
using Nac.Caching.Extensions;
using Nac.Identity.Extensions;
using Nac.Messaging.Extensions;
using Nac.Observability.Extensions;
using Nac.MultiTenancy.Extensions;
using Nac.WebApi.Extensions;

var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);
var config = builder.Configuration;
var connectionString = config.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection")!;

// CQRS + behaviors
builder.Services.AddNacMediator(opts =>
{
    opts.RegisterHandlersFromAssemblyContaining<CatalogModule>()
        .RegisterHandlersFromAssemblyContaining<OrdersModule>()
        .AddCommandBehavior(typeof(LoggingCommandBehavior<,>))
        .AddCommandBehavior(typeof(AuthorizationCommandBehavior<,>))
        .AddCommandBehavior(typeof(CacheInvalidationBehavior<,>))
        .AddCommandBehavior(typeof(UnitOfWorkBehavior<,>))
        .AddQueryBehavior(typeof(LoggingQueryBehavior<,>))
        .AddQueryBehavior(typeof(AuthorizationQueryBehavior<,>))
        .AddQueryBehavior(typeof(CachingQueryBehavior<,>));
});

// Identity
builder.Services.AddNacIdentity(config, dbOpts =>
    dbOpts.UseNpgsql(config.GetConnectionString("IdentityConnection")));

// Multi-tenancy
builder.Services.AddNacMultiTenancy(mt =>
{
    mt.AddHeaderResolver();
    mt.AddClaimResolver();
    mt.UseStore<DbTenantStore>();
});

// Modules
builder.Services.AddCatalogInfrastructure(connectionString);
builder.Services.AddOrdersInfrastructure(connectionString);

// Messaging
builder.Services.AddNacOutboxMessaging<CatalogDbContext>(typeof(CatalogModule).Assembly);

// Caching
builder.Services.AddNacCaching();

var app = builder.Build();

app.UseNacWebApi();
app.UseNacMultiTenancy();
app.UseAuthentication();
app.UseAuthorization();
app.UseNacIdentity();

var api = app.MapGroup("/api");
CatalogEndpoints.Map(api.MapGroup("/catalog").WithTags("Catalog"));
OrderEndpoints.Map(api.MapGroup("/orders").WithTags("Orders"));

app.Run();
```

---

## 17. Marker Interfaces Quick Reference

| Interface | Package | Namespace | Purpose | Applied to |
|-----------|---------|-----------|---------|------------|
| `ICommand` | Nac.CQRS | `Nac.CQRS.Abstractions` | Void write operation | Command records |
| `ICommand<T>` | Nac.CQRS | `Nac.CQRS.Abstractions` | Returning write operation | Command records |
| `IQuery<T>` | Nac.CQRS | `Nac.CQRS.Abstractions` | Read operation | Query records |
| `INotification` | Nac.Core | `Nac.Core.Messaging` | In-process pub/sub | Domain events |
| `IIntegrationEvent` | Nac.Core | `Nac.Core.Messaging` | Cross-boundary event | Integration events |
| `ITransactional` | Nac.Core | `Nac.Core.Modularity` | Wrap in DB transaction | Commands |
| `IRequirePermission` | Nac.Core | `Nac.Core.Auth` | Check permission | Commands, Queries |
| `ICacheable` | Nac.Core | `Nac.Core.Caching` | Cache query result | Queries |
| `ICacheInvalidator` | Nac.Core | `Nac.Core.Caching` | Invalidate cache keys | Commands |
| `IAuditable` | Nac.Core | `Nac.Core.Modularity` | Log audit trail | Commands |
| `IAuditableEntity` | Nac.Domain | `Nac.Domain` | Auto-fill timestamps | Entities |
| `ISoftDeletable` | Nac.Domain | `Nac.Domain` | Soft-delete behavior | Entities |

---

## 18. Entity Design Patterns

### Simple Entity

```csharp
public sealed class Product : AggregateRoot<Guid>, IAuditableEntity, ISoftDeletable
{
    public required string Name { get; set; }
    public decimal Price { get; set; }
    public string? Description { get; set; }

    // IAuditableEntity (auto-filled by NacDbContext)
    public DateTimeOffset CreatedAt { get; set; }
    public string? CreatedBy { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset? LastModifiedAt { get; set; }
    public string? LastModifiedBy { get; set; }

    // ISoftDeletable (auto-handled by NacDbContext)
    public bool IsDeleted { get; set; }
    public DateTimeOffset? DeletedAt { get; set; }
    public string? DeletedBy { get; set; }

    // Factory method
    public static Product Create(string name, decimal price, string? description = null)
    {
        var product = new Product
        {
            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),
            Name = name,
            Price = price,
            Description = description
        };
        product.RaiseDomainEvent(new ProductCreatedEvent(product.Id, product.Name));
        return product;
    }
}
```

### Value Object

```csharp
public sealed class Money : ValueObject
{
    public decimal Amount { get; }
    public string Currency { get; }

    public Money(decimal amount, string currency)
    {
        if (amount < 0) throw new NacDomainException("Amount cannot be negative");
        Amount = amount;
        Currency = currency ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(currency));
    }

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Amount;
        yield return Currency;
    }
}
```

### Strongly Typed Id

```csharp
public sealed record ProductId(Guid Value) : StronglyTypedId<Guid>(Value)
{
    public static ProductId New() => new(Guid.NewGuid());
}

// Entity using strongly typed Id:
public sealed class Product : AggregateRoot<ProductId>
{
    // ...
}
```

### Smart Enumeration

```csharp
public sealed class OrderStatus : Enumeration
{
    public static readonly OrderStatus Pending = new(1, nameof(Pending));
    public static readonly OrderStatus Confirmed = new(2, nameof(Confirmed));
    public static readonly OrderStatus Shipped = new(3, nameof(Shipped));
    public static readonly OrderStatus Delivered = new(4, nameof(Delivered));
    public static readonly OrderStatus Cancelled = new(5, nameof(Cancelled));

    private OrderStatus(int id, string name) : base(id, name) { }
}

// Usage:
var allStatuses = Enumeration.GetAll<OrderStatus>();
var status = Enumeration.FromName<OrderStatus>("Pending");
```

### EF Configuration (in .Infrastructure)

```csharp
public sealed class ProductConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<Product>
{
    public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<Product> builder)
    {
        builder.HasKey(x => x.Id);
        builder.Property(x => x.Name).HasMaxLength(200).IsRequired();
        builder.Property(x => x.Price).HasPrecision(18, 2);

        // Owned value object
        builder.OwnsOne(x => x.Price, money =>
        {
            money.Property(m => m.Amount).HasColumnName("Price").HasPrecision(18, 2);
            money.Property(m => m.Currency).HasColumnName("PriceCurrency").HasMaxLength(3);
        });

        // Ignore domain events (not persisted)
        builder.Ignore(x => x.DomainEvents);
    }
}
```
